templates.body: Withdrawal timing depends on the payment method and any required account checks. Please review the published payment-method timing information. This message does not confirm the status of a specific withdrawal.
Wagering requirements and game contribution rules depend on the promotion terms that applied when the offer was accepted. Please review the applicable promotion terms before playing.
Maximum-bet restrictions apply as stated in the promotion terms, including any separate treatment of bonus-buy features. Please review the terms for the exact offer.
Accepted proof-of-address documents and file requirements are listed in the verification guidance. Do not send identity documents or sensitive payment data through an unapproved support channel.
Use the approved account-recovery process associated with the registered email address. Support will not disclose or change authentication details through an unverified request.
Your request to stop promotional communications has been recorded for processing. This request does not close or self-exclude the account.
Loyalty-point expiry and redemption rules are set out in the current loyalty-program terms. Please consult those terms for the applicable expiry period.
Thank you for the feedback. It will be shared with the relevant team.

rule: The prototype selects a template ID but does not send messages.
